task: healthcare prediction (mortality, readmission, length of stay, drug recommendation)
input: patient electronic health records (EHR) and external knowledge graphs (biomedical KGs, LLM-extracted knowledge)
output: predictions for mortality, readmission, length of stay, and drug recommendations
key_idea: construct patient-specific knowledge graphs from external KGs and LLMs, then train a bi-attention GNN for multiple healthcare prediction tasks
